{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer",
  "description": "Kennedia Consulting Limited, we provide HR consulting, HR strategy, workforce planning, culture and HR transformation, recruitment and talent acquisition, assessment and development centres.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location: Ijora, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Electrical Engineer to design, develop, implement, and maintain electrical systems and components in line with required technical specifications and industry standards.


Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and implement electrical systems for power generation, transmission, and distribution.
	Perform electrical calculations, load analysis, and system design.
	Prepare technical drawings, schematics, specifications, and related engineering documentation.
	Conduct site inspections and supervise electrical installation and maintenance activities.
	Troubleshoot electrical faults and provide effective technical solutions.
	Ensure compliance with applicable safety standards, codes, regulations, and industry best practices.
	Collaborate with mechanical engineers, contractors, project managers, and other technical teams.
	Monitor project progress and provide regular technical and operational reports to management.
	Conduct testing, commissioning, and quality assurance of electrical systems and equipment.
	Support preventive and corrective maintenance programmes.
	Ensure all electrical works are completed in accordance with approved specifications and safety requirements.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in electrical engineering or a related field.
	1 &ndash; 3 years of relevant experience in power, construction, industrial, or related environments.
	Strong knowledge of electrical systems, power distribution, and control systems.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD, ETAP, MATLAB, or similar tools.
	Good understanding of local and international electrical codes and standards.
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.
	Supportive and innovative work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: adeniyi_kennedia@outlook.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Electrical Engineer Job at Kennedia Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Kennedia Consulting Limited, we provide HR consulting, HR strategy, workforce planning, culture and HR transformation, recruitment and talent acquisition, assessment and development centres.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location: Ijora, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Electrical Engineer to design, develop, implement, and maintain electrical systems and components in line with required technical specifications and industry standards.


Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Design, develop, and implement electrical systems for power generation, transmission, and distribution.
	Perform electrical calculations, load analysis, and system design.
	Prepare technical drawings, schematics, specifications, and related engineering documentation.
	Conduct site inspections and supervise electrical installation and maintenance activities.
	Troubleshoot electrical faults and provide effective technical solutions.
	Ensure compliance with applicable safety standards, codes, regulations, and industry best practices.
	Collaborate with mechanical engineers, contractors, project managers, and other technical teams.
	Monitor project progress and provide regular technical and operational reports to management.
	Conduct testing, commissioning, and quality assurance of electrical systems and equipment.
	Support preventive and corrective maintenance programmes.
	Ensure all electrical works are completed in accordance with approved specifications and safety requirements.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in electrical engineering or a related field.
	1 – 3 years of relevant experience in power, construction, industrial, or related environments.
	Strong knowledge of electrical systems, power distribution, and control systems.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD, ETAP, MATLAB, or similar tools.
	Good understanding of local and international electrical codes and standards.
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.
	Supportive and innovative work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	To analyze financial data for discrepancies or errors; reconcile data

	Ensuring standards are maintained and protocols are followed

	Assist in developing and maintain advanced Excel spreadsheet for a variety of applications.

	Apply basic accounting knowledge and techniques to all areas of work, including routine costing and varieties analysis.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Accountant Job at Greenlife Hospital Limited




        
    

        
        Greenlife Hospital is a registered, standard and a forward-thinking hospital. We pride ourselves in excellent and top-notch services making sure our corporate partners over the years are satisfied and happy.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:  Accountant

Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	To analyze financial data for discrepancies or errors; reconcile data
	Promote the mission, values and vison of the organization.
	Maintain specified financial records; maintain and reconcile account ledgers; maintain and enter monthly journal entries, maintain and reconcile bank accounts.
	Enforcing work output to minimize cost and maximize efficiencies. While also ensuring that the services provided are the best possible in the market
	Overseeing account receivable, account payable and payroll.
	Develop a budget and perform and analysis of the organization’s financial situation.
	Ensuring standards are maintained and protocols are followed
	Putting together the hospitals payroll and submitting all tax documents.
	Assist in developing and maintain advanced Excel spreadsheet for a variety of applications.
	Assess financial impact of proposed services and programs and monitor financial cost/benefits of existing programs and services.
	Apply basic accounting knowledge and techniques to all areas of work, including routine costing and varieties analysis.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Recruitment Officer Job at Fort Knox Outsourcing
content:
Fort Knox Outsourcing is poised to serve the growing need of businesses in Nigeria. By helping them to reap the economic, strategic and operational benefits offered by outsourcing. We act as a “Third Party Service Provider” that Source, Select, and Second employment ready workforce in line with client specifications to meet their talent needs as quickly as possible.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:  Recruitment Officer

Job Location: Ogodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Manage the full recruitment lifecycle from job requisition to onboarding.
	Prepare and publish job advertisements across various recruitment platforms and social media channels.
	Source candidates through job boards, LinkedIn, referrals, databases, and other recruitment channels.
	Screen CVs and shortlist qualified candidates based on job requirements.
	Conduct telephone, virtual, and face-to-face interviews.
	Coordinate interview schedules between candidates and hiring managers.
	Administer recruitment assessments and evaluate candidates.
	Perform background, reference, and employment verification checks where applicable.
	Prepare interview reports and recruitment recommendations.
	Issue offer letters and coordinate onboarding activities.
	Maintain an up-to-date candidate database and recruitment tracker.
	Build and maintain a strong talent pipeline for current and future vacancies.
	Monitor recruitment KPIs such as time-to-fill, cost-per-hire, and quality of hire.
	Ensure compliance with company recruitment policies and employment regulations.
	Develop and maintain relationships with universities, recruitment agencies, and professional bodies.
	Support employer branding initiatives and recruitment marketing campaigns.
	Prepare periodic recruitment reports and analytics for management.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or any related discipline.
	2–4 years of experience in recruitment, talent acquisition, or human resources.
	Experience recruiting across multiple industries will be an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of competency-based interviewing techniques.
	Experience using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) is an advantage.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Outlook).
	Excellent sourcing skills using LinkedIn, job boards, and social media platforms.
	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Excellent negotiation and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to manage multiple vacancies simultaneously.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.
	High level of professionalism and confidentiality.


Salary
Competitive (Based on Experience).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using " Recruitment Officer " as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Web / Mobile Developer Job at Creative Mansion




        
    

        
        Creative Mansion is a values-driven Digital Agency dedicated to empowering our customers. We are a team of passionate individuals who believe in the power of technology to change lives. We work with our clients to help them achieve their goals and make their visions a reality. We are committed to making a positive impact on the world, one project at a time.

Over the years, we have had extensive experience working with both big businesses and small startups. We help companies achieve their goals by increasing visibility, driving web traffic, connecting with customers, and boosting sales. Certified by CAC Corporate Affairs Commission (BN/RC: 3359684). Give us a call.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

            
    



 Job Position: Web / Mobile Developer

Job Locations: Lagos
Job Type: Full Time, Part Time
Job Category: Web Development, Mobile App Development

Job Description


	Modifying and maintaining existing websites and mobile apps across Android and IOS platforms
	Development of application programming interfaces (APIs) to support mobile functionality
	Keeping up to date with the terminology, concepts, and best practices for coding mobile apps
	Conferring with teams to resolve conflicts, prioritize needs, develop content criteria, or choose solutions.
	Back up files from Web sites to local directories for recovery.
	Evaluating code to ensure it meets industry standards, is valid, is properly structured, and is compatible with browsers, devices, or operating systems.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related field, or relevant experience.
	Solid knowledge and experience in programming applications.
	Proficient in JavaScript, HTML, CSS.
	Proficient in My SQL.
	Demonstrable portfolio of released applications on the App Store or the Android market
	Extensive knowledge of at least one programming language like Swift and Java.
	Knowledge of e-commerce cms frameworks like woo commerce and the rest
	Dedicated team player.
	Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.
	Solid ability in both written and verbal communication.
	Knowledge of programming language and technical terminology.
	Able to develop ideas and processes and clearly express them.
	A high degree of independent judgment.
	Able to solve complex problems.
